mprScheduleLookup.Description: Search for schedules in a project that contain the specified value
mprScheduleLookup.FullDescription: Searching for specified strings (whole or partial) and numbers among project schedules in field names, column headers, or cells, with or without case sensitivity
mprScheduleLookup.h3: Double-click on the line opens the details window
mprScheduleLookup.h7: This project has no schedules!\nCannot continue.
mprScheduleLookup.h27: Press space bar twice to insert delimiter
mprScheduleLookup.h33: Enter the names of the fields or parameters that must be present in the schedule, separating them with a "{0}" character
mprScheduleLookup.h34: Enter the column headings that should be present in the schedule, separating them with a "{0}" character
mprScheduleLookup.h35: Enter the cell values that must be present in the schedule, separating them with a "{0}" character
mprScheduleLookup.sr3: The name of the containing schedule:
